text: Debris are visual objects that have no impact on any other object.
Add a black hole that attracts nearby debris towards its position.
params: The position of the black hole.
An optional secondary position, making the black hole a capsule shape instead of a sphere.
A force applied along direction from position to position2. (Defaults to 0)
The radius within which debris will start to dissolve. (Defaults to 0)
The time the black hole will be simulated before disappearing. (Defaults to one tick)
The channel this black hole affects. Debris only reacts to black holes matching its channel. 0 means no debris is affected. (Defaults to 1)

text: Create visual debris of a [Shape, shape] from its [Uuid, uuid], that collides with world objects but does not have an impact on them.
params: The angular velocity in radians per second around the axes (x,y,z). (Defaults to zero)
The color. (Defaults to the shape's default color)
The time the debris will be simulated before disappearing. (Defaults to 10 seconds)
